_publications._publicationTitle: Murine models of IDH-wild-type glioblastoma exhibit spatial segregation of tumor initiation and manifestation during evolution.

_contextSnippet: loss of Pten protein expression was accompanied by the activation of PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 signaling in autologous tumors isolated from the brain parenchyma
details: Successfully detected activation of PI3K/Akt/mTORC1 signaling in parenchymal tumors with Pten loss
